{{CargoRelic
|name=Omni Agent License
|class_id=20380
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The license-holder is an omnipotent agent of the investigation bureau who is granted law enforcement power by the federal law. Please be cooperative when you are questioned and frisked, as the omnipotent agent has the right to use force! (Stamped)
|fame=18
|art=15
|fth=18
|civ=11
|tech=28
|ss1=Defeated Omni Agents drop +10 W-tads
|ss2=Defeated Omni Agents drop +20 W-tads
|ss3=Defeated Omni Agents drop +30 W-tads
|ss4=Defeated Omni Agents drop +30 W-tads
|ss7=Defeated Omni Agents drop +30 W-tads<br> (Awakened)
}}
